mapper.select: SELECT ID AS id, SETTING_REPLY AS settingReply, SETTING_GOOD AS settingGood, SETTING_BULLETIN AS settingBulletin, SETTING_STUDY AS settingStudy, SETTING_EMAIL_PUSH AS settingEmailPush, SETTING_POST_OPEN AS settingPostOpen, SETTING_SIGN_DEFAULT AS settingSignDefault, SETTING_BRAILLE_TRANSLATE AS settingBrailleTranslate, SETTING_AUTO_SCROLL AS settingAutoScroll, SETTING_PUSH_NOTIFY AS settingPushNotify, SETTING_MENTION_NOTIFY AS settingMentionNotify, USER_ID AS userId FROM TBL_SETTING WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE TBL_SETTING SET SETTING_REPLY = #{requestDTO.settingReply}, SETTING_GOOD = #{requestDTO.settingGood}, SETTING_BULLETIN = #{requestDTO.settingBulletin}, SETTING_STUDY = #{requestDTO.settingStudy}, SETTING_EMAIL_PUSH = #{requestDTO.settingEmailPush}, SETTING_POST_OPEN = #{requestDTO.settingPostOpen}, SETTING_SIGN_DEFAULT = #{requestDTO.settingSignDefault}, SETTING_BRAILLE_TRANSLATE = #{requestDTO.settingBrailleTranslate}, SETTING_AUTO_SCROLL = #{requestDTO.settingAutoScroll}, SETTING_PUSH_NOTIFY = #{requestDTO.settingPushNotify}, SETTING_MENTION_NOTIFY = #{requestDTO.settingMentionNotify} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
